title: Immediate DNC request honored
description: Prospect asks to be removed from the list at opening. Dana apologizes and closes the call without pitching.

turns.speaker: dana
turns.text: Hi, this is Alex with American Beneficiary. I was checking if you're still open to looking at final expense options.

turns.speaker: prospect
turns.text: Stop calling me, take me off your list.

turns.speaker: dana
turns.text: I apologize for the bother. I will make sure your number is placed on our do not call list. Have a good day.
